name: MoFin Lending
description_short: MoFin Lending is a direct lender specializing in hard money and bridge loans for real estate investors, offering quick closings and transparent pricing for fix-and-flip, rental, and construction properties.
description_long:
MoFin Lending operates as a direct hard money lender focused exclusively on real estate investors rather than traditional homebuyers. The company positions itself as an alternative to conventional mortgage lenders by targeting investors seeking rapid funding for investment properties across multiple strategies including fix-and-flip projects, rental property acquisitions, and ground-up construction. MoFin markets itself as a specialized lender that understands investor needs and offers flexibility that traditional banks typically don't provide.

MoFin offers three primary loan products: Bridge Loans (12-18 month terms for fix-and-flip and value-add properties with rates from 8.25%-10.25%), Rental Loans (30-year fixed-term loans for single properties or portfolios with rates from 5.75%-7.875%), and Construction Loans (12-18 month terms for 1-4 unit residential properties with rates from 8.50%-10.50%). All loan products require a minimum loan amount of $150,000. The rental loan product notably qualifies borrowers based on rental property income rather than personal income, and includes options for short-term rentals like Airbnb and VRBO properties. Bridge and construction loans include no prepayment penalties and interest-only options.

MoFin distinguishes itself through three claimed differentiators: a quick, online-based process with dedicated team members for borrower support; transparent upfront pricing with term sheets provided immediately after pre-qualification and explicit promises of no hidden fees; and "certainty of close" guarantees where the lender commits to either closing on the borrower's timeline or providing the earliest feasible close date. The company emphasizes direct lending without passing loans through multiple intermediaries, and borrower testimonials highlight funding for portfolios of 100+ properties and refinancing of 15+ single-family rentals by repeat clients.

However, MoFin's loan products come with significantly higher interest rates than conventional mortgages (8.25%-10.50% on short-term products, 5.75%-7.875% on rental products), reflecting the hard money lender model. The company's focus is exclusively on investment properties—not primary residences, owner-occupied homes, or borrowers without real estate investment experience. Minimum loan amounts of $150,000 exclude smaller investors. While marketed as "transparent," the website provides limited detail about underwriting criteria, loan-to-value ratios, required down payments, or specific closing cost structures. The lender's products are designed for a niche audience of active real estate investors with established portfolios or experienced operators.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No prepayment penalties on bridge and construction loans, allowing investors to refinance or pay off early without fees
Rental loans qualified on rental property income only—no personal income verification required, beneficial for investors with irregular personal income
Explicit upfront pricing with term sheets provided within one business day of pre-qualification, reducing surprises at closing
Direct lender model with dedicated team members assigned to borrowers, improving communication and responsiveness
Portfolio and short-term rental options available, accommodating Airbnb/VRBO properties and multi-property investors
Interest-only options available on rental loans, reducing cash flow burden during property stabilization
30-year fixed rental loan terms with competitive rates relative to hard money market (5.75%-7.875%)
cons: Hard money loan rates (8.25%-10.50% on bridge/construction products) significantly exceed conventional mortgage rates, increasing borrowing costs
Exclusive focus on investment properties means ineligible for primary residence, owner-occupied, or first-time investor borrowers
$150,000 minimum loan amount excludes smaller investors or deals below that threshold
Website lacks transparency on key underwriting factors including loan-to-value ratios, required down payments, and detailed closing cost breakdowns
Short 12-18 month terms on bridge and construction loans create refinancing risk and timing pressure for deals that exceed the window
best_for: Active real estate investors with established portfolios seeking rapid funding for fix-and-flip or value-add projects
Rental property investors and landlords needing long-term financing for single properties or portfolios without personal income requirements
Short-term rental operators (Airbnb/VRBO) and investors who need lenders willing to qualify on rental income rather than traditional employment
diagnosis: MoFin Lending is best suited for experienced real estate investors with established portfolios who need rapid funding and are comfortable with hard money loan rates and short-term terms. The primary caveat is that this is not a lender for primary residence homebuyers, first-time investors, or borrowers seeking conventional mortgage rates—it is exclusively an investment property lender with significantly higher costs and shorter time horizons than traditional banks.
services: Bridge loans for fix-and-flip, BRRRR strategy, ground-up construction, and value-add properties
12-18 month bridge loan terms with no prepayment penalties
30-year fixed rental property loans with interest-only options
Single property and portfolio rental financing
Construction loans for 1-4 unit residential properties
Rate/Term, Purchase, and Cash-out refinancing options
Short-term rental financing for Airbnb and VRBO properties
Online application and borrower portal system
Pre-qualification with term sheet estimates within one business day
Dedicated loan officer support throughout the application process
Funding for 1-4 unit residential and 5+ unit multifamily properties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: MoFin Lending specializes in hard money and bridge loans for real estate investors, offering quick closings and transparent pricing.
